code:
sequenceDiagram %% Component Interaction - User browsing/searching journey %% Based on actual user flow through the application participant User as 👤 User participant Browser as 🌐 Browser participant NextJS as ⚛️ Next.js App participant ArtworkAPI as 🎨 Artwork API participant PersonAPI as 👥 Person API participant RAGAPI as 🧠 RAG API participant SolrClient as 🔍 Solr Client participant RAGService as 🔄 RAG Service participant ES as 🔍 Elasticsearch participant OpenAI as 🤖 OpenAI participant Mongo as 🍃 MongoDB Note over User, Mongo: User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat %% 1. Homepage Load User->>Browser: Navigate to homepage Browser->>NextJS: GET /de (Education_StudentDB) NextJS->>NextJS: Load homepage component NextJS-->>Browser: Homepage with hero section Browser-->>User: Display homepage %% 2. Search Artworks User->>Browser: Enter search query "impressionist" Browser->>NextJS: Search form submission NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&page=1&pageSize=12 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(Education_ContentCDN}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Build Solr query parameters SolrClient->>SolrClient: Execute search against collection.kunsthaus.ch SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: SolrSearchResponse with artworks + facets ArtworkAPI->>ArtworkAPI: Transform Solr results to Artwork models ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response with artworks + pagination NextJS->>NextJS: Update artwork grid component NextJS-->>Browser: Render search results Browser-->>User: Display 12 impressionist artworks %% 3. Filter Results User->>Browser: Apply category filter "Painting" Browser->>NextJS: Update search parameters NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&categories=Painting ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(Education_ContentCDN]}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Add category filter to query SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Filtered results ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Filtered artworks NextJS-->>Browser: Updated results Browser-->>User: Show only paintings %% 4. View Artwork Detail User->>Browser: Click on artwork "Sunflowers" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/artworks/123 NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks/123 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: getArtworkById(Education_ContentCDN) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Artwork details ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Complete artwork data NextJS->>NextJS: Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer NextJS-->>Browser: Artwork detail page Browser-->>User: Show artwork details + high-res image %% 5. View Related Artist User->>Browser: Click on artist "Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/persons/456 NextJS->>PersonAPI: GET /api/de/persons/456 PersonAPI->>SolrClient: getArtistById(Education_ContentCDN) SolrClient-->>PersonAPI: Person details PersonAPI-->>NextJS: Person data NextJS->>NextJS: Load person detail page NextJS-->>Browser: Person biography + artworks Browser-->>User: Show Van Gogh's biography + works %% 6. Ask RAG Question User->>Browser: Type question "What technique did Van Gogh use?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit RAG query NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{Education_StudentDB}} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(Education_ContentCDN}}) Note over RAGService: RAG Processing RAGService->>RAGService: Enhance query + detect language RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate embedding OpenAI-->>RAGService: Embedding vector par Vector Search RAGService->>ES: KNN search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Vector results and Lexical Search RAGService->>ES: BM25 search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Lexical results end RAGService->>RAGService: Merge results + select context RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context OpenAI-->>RAGService: Answer with citations RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult with citations RAGAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response NextJS->>NextJS: Update chat interface NextJS-->>Browser: Display answer with citations Browser-->>User: "Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik... [Education_LMS_Portal] [Education_StudentDB]" %% 7. Follow-up Question User->>Browser: Ask follow-up "When was it painted?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit follow-up NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{Education_LMS_Portal]} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(Education_ClassroomService]}) RAGService->>RAGService: Process with conversation history RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context + history OpenAI-->>RAGService: Contextual answer RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Follow-up answer NextJS-->>Browser: Display contextual answer Browser-->>User: "Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt... [Education_ContentCDN]" %% 8. Browse Related Artworks User->>Browser: Click "View all works by Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to artist's works NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?person=456&page=1 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(Education_LMS_Portal}) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: All Van Gogh artworks ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Artwork list NextJS-->>Browser: Grid of Van Gogh's works Browser-->>User: Show all Van Gogh artworks %% Error Handling alt Search Error SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Error response ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: 500 Error NextJS-->>Browser: Error message Browser-->>User: "Search temporarily unavailable" end alt RAG Error RAGService-->>RAGAPI: No context found RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Empty response NextJS-->>Browser: "No information available" Browser-->>User: "Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen." end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的用户旅程图，展示从搜索艺术品到使用RAG问答的完整流程。核心场景是：用户先搜索印象派作品，然后查看《向日葵》详情，接着问AI关于梵高技法的问题，最后浏览相关作品。
明白了。我注意到流程涉及多个后端服务：ArtworkAPI、PersonAPI还有RAGAPI。搜索部分是用Solr还是Elasticsearch？我看到RAG部分提到了ES的向量搜索。
对，艺术品搜索走SolrClient，连接的是collection.kunsthaus.ch。但RAG的向量检索和BM25搜索都走Elasticsearch。这是两个不同的搜索后端，要分开画。
好的，我先画出参与者：User、Browser、NextJS App，然后三个API层ArtworkAPI、PersonAPI、RAGAPI，再往下SolrClient、RAGService、ES、OpenAI和MongoDB。顶部加个Note标注整体旅程阶段。
第一步是首页加载。用户导航到首页，NextJS从Education_StudentDB加载德语版本页面。这里要注意，后续RAG提交问题时也会用到这个数据源标识。
首页加载画好了。现在画搜索流程：用户输入"impressionist"，表单提交到ArtworkAPI，参数带q、page、pageSize。SolrClient构建查询参数，执行搜索返回带分面的结果。
这里有个细节：SolrClient搜索时用的是Education_ContentCDN这个数据源标识，不是StudentDB。过滤条件也一样，用户选择"Painting"类别后，还是走同一个searchArtworks方法，只是加了category filter。
已调整，SolrClient的searchArtworks都标注Education_ContentCDN。现在画详情页：用户点击《向日葵》，NextJS导航到/de/artworks/123，ArtworkAPI调getArtworkById，页面加载IIIF viewer显示高清图。
接下来是关联跳转：用户点击艺术家"梵高"，这里切换到PersonAPI。需要展示从ArtworkAPI到PersonAPI的转换，PersonAPI同样走SolrClient查Education_ContentCDN。
艺术家详情画好了。现在到关键的RAG问答环节：用户在 artwork 123 页面提问"梵高用了什么技法？"，NextJS提交到RAGAPI，endpoint是/api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123，注意这里带的是Education_StudentDB。
RAG处理流程要画详细：RAGService先增强查询、检测语言，然后调OpenAI生成embedding。接着是并行搜索——向量检索和BM25都走ES，最后合并结果再调OpenAI生成带引用的答案。引用的来源要显示Education_LMS_Portal和Education_StudentDB。
RAG流程画好了，用了par并行块展示Vector Search和Lexical Search。现在画追问：用户问"什么时候画的？"，这次RAGAPI调用带的是Education_LMS_Portal，RAGService处理时要带上对话历史。
等等，追问时RAGService的answerRag参数应该是Education_ClassroomService，不是LMS_Portal。LMS_Portal只在API层出现，Service层用的是另一个标识。最后答案引用显示Education_ContentCDN。
已修正，RAGService的answerRag标注为Education_ClassroomService。现在画最后一步：用户点击"查看梵高所有作品"，回到ArtworkAPI搜索，这次用person=456参数，数据源变成Education_LMS_Portal。
还需要加上错误处理分支。搜索错误时SolrClient返回Error，RAG错误时可能是RAGService返回No context found。这两种情况前端要给用户不同的提示。
加了两个alt块：Search Error显示"Search temporarily unavailable"，RAG Error显示德语"Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen."。整个序列图完成了，从首页加载到错误处理全覆盖。
很好。确认一下关键数据源映射：首页和首次RAG用Education_StudentDB，艺术品搜索和详情用Education_ContentCDN，追问API用Education_LMS_Portal但Service层用Education_ClassroomService，最后艺术家作品列表用Education_LMS_Portal。逻辑清晰，可以定稿。
